name: Green Bean Caesar
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh green beans or two 9 oz. packages frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut green beans into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cook the green beans for 5 minutes uncovered, then cover and cook for 10-15 minutes more.
3. Drain the green beans.
4. Toss the cooked green beans with oil, vinegar, onion, salt, garlic, and pepper.
5. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 1-quart casserole dish.
6. Mix bread crumbs, grated Parmesan cheese, and melted butter or margarine.
7. Sprinkle over the green beans.
8. Sprinkle with paprika.
9. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes. Serves 6-8.
